execution_run.what happened: Implemented scripts/check/run_generated_command_test_ir.py as an IR-defined generated command behavior runner with schema validation, Python and TypeScript target execution, target selection, parity aggregation, unavailable/skipped/fail/pass states, and compact JSON/text proof output.
execution_run.scope touched: Generated command test IR runner, initial IR error expectation, runner regression tests, contract test assertion, and Planning closeout state.

finished_run_review.scope respected: Reviewed against #1444 acceptance: runner validates the IR, executes the representative success/error/parity suite, supports python/typescript/parity target selection, reports pass/fail/unavailable/skipped states, and keeps handwritten tests until #1445 migrates or demotes them. Dogfooding found Python and TypeScript invalid-format stderr wording differed; the IR now asserts the shared --format validation signal rather than Python-specific text. A parallel make test-workspace run hit a transient sdist build failure; direct sdist build, direct packaging test, and serial make test-workspace all passed.
